image:image.image:title: LiteForge DEX — LitVM Testnet
image:image.image:caption: Swap, bridge, stake and forge tokens on LitVM LiteForge, the trustless EVM rollup secured by Litecoin.

image:image.image:title: LiteForge DEX — DeFi forged on Litecoin's bedrock
image:image.image:caption: Trustless EVM rollup secured by Litecoin proof-of-work. Trade, bridge, stake on LitVM.

image:image.image:title: Swap Tokens on LiteForge DEX
image:image.image:caption: Instant token swaps on LitVM LiteForge with trustless EVM rollup security.

image:image.image:title: Bridge Assets — LiteForge DEX
image:image.image:caption: Bridge tokens between Litecoin, Ethereum, and LitVM with cryptographic guarantees.

image:image.image:title: Stake & Earn — LiteForge DEX
image:image.image:caption: Stake zkLTC and earn rewards on the LitVM LiteForge rollup.

image:image.image:title: Provide Liquidity — LiteForge DEX
image:image.image:caption: Earn fees by providing liquidity to LiteForge DEX pools on LitVM.

image:image.image:title: Token Explorer — LiteForge DEX
image:image.image:caption: Browse all tokens listed on LiteForge DEX with live prices and stats.

image:image.image:title: Airdrop — LiteForge DEX
image:image.image:caption: Claim your LiteForge testnet airdrop rewards.

image:image.image:title: About LiteForge DEX
image:image.image:caption: Learn about LiteForge DEX, the DeFi platform forged on Litecoin's bedrock.
